title: crassula cordata
intro: Crassula cordata, also known as the succulent jade plant, is a low-growing, spreading succulent native to South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever, colds, and digestive issues, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and regulating blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, Crassula cordata is typically used as a tea or tincture, and is also used to make a topical cream for skin irritations and wounds.
